title: piper guayranum var. humilius
intro: Piper guayranum var. humilius, also known as the Guayra pepper, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Piperaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Piper guayranum var. humilius are said to include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
